title: Incentive Account Arrangement
description:
Is an Arrangement to manage an account used to accumulate, track, and distribute incentives or rewards based on predefined conditions under an agreement.

An arrangement within the incentive account agreement

Comment:
An Incentive Account Arrangement is the contractual and operational record that governs how a customer earns, accumulates, and redeems incentives under a specific program.

An Incentive Account Arrangement refers to the structured setup between a financial institution and a customer in which an account is governed by specific terms that reward the customer for meeting predefined conditions. These conditions may include actions such as maintaining a minimum balance, making regular deposits, or limiting withdrawals.

IncentiveAccountArrangementType.description: Incentive Account Arrangement Type describes how the incentive account is organized, funded, and paid out.
